## Affected Navigation Option(s)

- [ ] Option 1 (top nav + sidebar) — `npm run dev:1` → http://localhost:5171
- [ ] Option 2 (side nav with hover-card flyouts) — `npm run dev:2` → http://localhost:5172
- [ ] Option 3 (collapsible side nav) — `npm run dev:3` → http://localhost:5173
- [ ] Shared code (affects all options)

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `npm run dev:X` (replace X with the affected option)
2. Navigate to `...`
3. Perform action `...`
4. Observe `...`
